skill.name: website-maintainer
skill.description: Guides AI assistants through Repomix documentation website maintenance, including VitePress configuration, multilingual content, and translation workflows.
skill.summary: Maintain the Repomix VitePress documentation site across configuration, navigation, content, and translations.
skill.author: yamadashy

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged Markdown backticks as Ruby or shell execution and weak cryptography, but SKILL.md only contains frontmatter, a plaintext directory tree, file path examples, and maintenance guidance. No executable scripts, commands, network access, environment access, prompt injection text, or data exfiltration behavior were found.

content.value_statement: Multilingual documentation sites are hard to keep consistent across content, navigation, and search settings. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code focused guidance for Repomix VitePress website maintenance.
actual_capabilities: Explains the Repomix website directory structure under website/client.
Identifies where VitePress locale configuration files are maintained.
Guides adding a new documentation language from existing English content.
Directs edits for documents, navigation, sidebars, shared settings, and search labels.
Keeps English documentation as the source of truth for translation work.
limitations: Does not include automated translation scripts or validation tools.
Does not define deployment, preview, or build commands for the website.
Assumes the Repomix repository structure matches the documented website/client layout.
Provides guidance only for documentation website maintenance, not core Repomix code.

use_cases.title: Add a Documentation Locale
use_cases.description: Create a new language section by copying English content, adding locale configuration, and updating search settings.

use_cases.title: Update Navigation Labels
use_cases.description: Find the correct VitePress config file for translated navigation, sidebar, and search modal text.

use_cases.title: Edit Shared Website Settings
use_cases.description: Locate shared website settings such as logo and footer configuration before making global documentation changes.

prompt_templates.title: Find the Right File
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner task for a single documentation edit.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the website-maintainer skill. I need to update a Repomix documentation page. Tell me which website/client files to inspect first.

prompt_templates.title: Update a Locale Page
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate task for editing translated content.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the website-maintainer skill. Update the Japanese installation guide while keeping code examples and CLI options unchanged.

prompt_templates.title: Add a New Language
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced task for creating a new locale.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the website-maintainer skill. Add a new VitePress language section based on English content and update locale, search, and sidebar configuration.

prompt_templates.title: Review Website Consistency
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced review across content and configuration.
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the website-maintainer skill. Review the Repomix documentation website for inconsistent locale navigation, missing sidebar entries, and untranslated search labels.

output_examples.input: Where should I edit the French sidebar?
output_examples.output: Edit the French VitePress locale config file under website/client/.vitepress/config. Check the themeConfig.sidebar section for French navigation entries.

output_examples.input: I want to add a new language to the documentation site.
output: Create a new locale config from an existing language config.
Import it into the main VitePress config locales map.
Add search configuration in the shared config shard.
Copy English content into the new language source directory.

output_examples.input: What should stay unchanged during translation?
output_examples.output: Keep code examples and CLI options unchanged. Translate documentation prose and UI labels in the relevant locale config file.

best_practices: Use English documentation as the source of truth before editing translated pages.
Update content and matching navigation entries together when page structure changes.
Keep code examples, command names, and CLI options unchanged during translation.
anti_patterns: Do not translate CLI flags, package names, or code examples.
Do not add locale pages without adding matching VitePress locale and search configuration.
Do not edit shared settings in a locale file when the setting belongs in configShard.ts.

faq.question: What website framework does this skill target?
faq.answer: It targets the Repomix documentation website built with VitePress.

faq.question: Can this skill add a new language?
faq.answer: Yes. It describes the files and steps needed to add a new language section.

faq.question: Does it perform automatic translation?
faq.answer: No. It provides translation workflow guidance but does not include a translation engine.

faq.question: Which directory does it focus on?
faq.answer: It focuses on the website/client directory inside the Repomix repository.

faq.question: Can it change navigation and sidebar labels?
faq.answer: Yes. It points maintainers to the per-language VitePress config files.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The audit found only Markdown documentation and no executable command behavior.
